signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO** | **MED** confidence[1]

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and aligning with the Bank of Korea's revised 2.2% outlook for the year[1]. This figure, sourced from Statistics Korea and reported by Trading Economics, reflects contained pric
